meaning: intensive care unit 重点护理组
examples: We spent the next two nights in the ICU.
I rushed to NUH ICU to see you immediately after lesson.
Then, in April 2006, I wound up back in the ICU with heart failure.
Shares of ICU Medical are up more than 8% in extended trading on better-than-expected quarterly results.
There is a lot of noise that goes on in ICU. The people are oddly silent.
